Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by self-represented Plaintiff Martha Luz Johnson. Court ordered case dismissed with prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Sanctions imposed on Sep-01-2015 and Dec-01-2015 are vacated in open court. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
